lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: Those children are nothing but trouble - if I did not watch them all the time, Seren knows what trouble they would get in to!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They look old enough to look after themselves.

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: They are only 34 and 38, far too young to be left unsupervised.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Only!?! How old does that make you?

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: Has no one told you it is rude to ask a lady her age?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I wasn't thinking. Anyway... I'd better stop distracting you.

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: Okay, See you some other time.

sections.title: During Song of the Elves, after the attack on Lletya

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: I can't thank you enough for what you did. My children might be dead if not for you.

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: You're a hero and all of us here know it. Again, thank you.

lines.speaker: Mawrth
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?
